topic: Trying to assemble flat-pack furniture without the instructions
text_en: Oh man, I'm at it again. This flat-pack bookshelf seemed like a good idea online, but now it's just a pile of wood and screws. The worst part? I can't find the instructions anywhere! I've looked high and low, checked the box, even under the sofa. Nothing. So, I'm just winging it, trying to figure out which piece goes where. It's a real puzzle, you know? I've already put one side on backward, so I had to take it apart and start over. Wish me luck, I think I'm going to be here all afternoon trying to get this thing together. It's never as easy as it looks on the pictures!
